session.user: Run the following commands and report all results, especially any failures: uv run pytest tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py -v Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest commands to test the checkout functionality and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on checkout command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
